Package de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op

Class ProgramConstant

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.AbstractSortedOperator
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.ProgramVariable
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.ProgramConstant
All Implemented Interfaces:
Expression, ModelElement, ProgramElement, ReferencePrefix, ReferenceSuffix, SourceElement, TerminalProgramElement, Named, IProgramVariable, Operator, ParsableVariable, SortedOperator, SVSubstitute, ProgramInLogic, Sorted, EqualsModProofIrrelevancy
public final class ProgramConstant extends ProgramVariable
This class represents currently only static final fields initialised with a compile time constant. These fields cannot occur on the left side of an update.

    • getCompileTimeConstant

      public Literal getCompileTimeConstant()
      Returns:
      the value of the initializer as a literal, if this variable is a compile-time constant, null otherwise

    • validTopLevelException

      public void validTopLevelException(Term term) throws TermCreationException
      Description copied from interface: Operator
      Checks whether the top level structure of the given @link Term is syntactically valid, given the assumption that the top level operator of the term is the same as this Operator. The assumption that the top level operator and the term are equal is NOT checked.
      Specified by:
      validTopLevelException in interface Operator
      Throws:
      TermCreationException - if a construction error was recognise
